name: Enforce STRUCTURE.md Pre-Check
description: Before any file write, remind the agent to verify it has read the STRUCTURE.md section for that file

then.prompt: Before writing this file: confirm you have read the STRUCTURE.md section for it. Identify every guardrail, every dependency, and every failure mode specified for this file. If you have not read it yet, read it now before proceeding. Do not write the file until this check is complete.
